# LocReport
> Daily localization and translation industry intelligence

LocReport is an independent publication tracking the language services industry.
We cover AI translation, localization platforms, quality evaluation, regulatory
developments, and market shifts affecting global communication professionals.

## Key Resources
- Signal Tracker: /signals/ — 10 tracked industry signals with evidence
- Monthly Reports: /monthly-reports/ — editorial synthesis of monthly trends
- Daily Coverage: / — curated news with professional analysis
- Newsletter: /newsletter/ — weekly digest and signal alerts

## Topics Covered
Translation management, machine translation, post-editing (MTPE), AI agents in
localization, quality evaluation (MQM, COMET), TMS platforms, language regulation,
localization-first design, multimodal content localization, LSP market dynamics.

## Audience
Localization managers, language technology professionals, translation service
providers, enterprise globalization teams, and language industry analysts.
